prompt: Create a UI dashboard mockup combining the clean layout and data components (charts, panels) from image 1, rendered in the hand-drawn, sketch-like style of image 2, including conceptual annotations.
prompt_refined: Generate a UI dashboard mockup. The mockup should feature a structured, modular layout with diverse data components, including various charts (pie, bar, line) and numerical statistics panels, all inspired by the clean, modern design of image 1. The entire dashboard must be rendered in the distinct hand-drawn, informal, sketch-like style exemplified by image 2, complete with handwritten conceptual annotations, labels, and arrows explaining or highlighting UI elements.
objects: Hand-drawn, informal, sketch-like style for all UI elements
Hand-drawn arrows explaining or highlighting UI elements
